article.title: Ulta Beauty stock drops as company reports mixed earnings, gives 2026 guidance
article.summary: Ulta Beauty reported fiscal fourth-quarter earnings Thursday that beat Wall Street revenue expectations but missed on earnings per share.

story_pack.subtitle_text:
Ulta Beauty stock drops as company reports mixed earnings, gives 2026 guidance

Ulta Beauty reported fiscal fourth-quarter earnings Thursday that beat Wall Street revenue expectations but missed on earnings per share.
